notes: First public build — opens in your browser at localhost:1337 (universal, no Rosetta). YouTube + Shorts, playlists/channels, MP3, quality presets, choose-folder, per-browser cookie guidance, self-update, yt-dlp refresh. Phone access via a stable hostname + one-time PIN (Tailscale for away-from-home) and save-to-device. TikTok/Instagram/Facebook experimental.
